_meta.author: Peter Higgins / Claude (Cowork session)
_meta.purpose: Single-file AI context loader for the Rogue Wave Audio (RWA) repository. Load FIRST in any new RWA session. Created 2026-06-07 by the Cowork corpus-authority reconciliation to give RWA the same fast-refresh layer HUF and Hs already have. Source of truth for RWA canonical names; on any conflict with a document, this file wins. The RWA-001.json lab identity card and HUF_RELATIONSHIP.json remain the deeper canonical references.
_meta.refresh_protocol: When new canonical results land, update this file FIRST, then rebuild documents from it.

companions.lab_identity: RWA-001.json — canonical BTL lab identity card
companions.lineage: LINEAGE.md + HUF_RELATIONSHIP.json — arc from RWA engineering to HUF/Hs formalization
companions.ground_state: THE_GROUND_STATE.md — the headwater: the one formula (6.02 dB apportioned, f_c=115/dim), ground state = simplex barycentre, time forced by the boundary not tacked on (added 2026-06-11)
companions.arc_of_discovery: ARC_OF_DISCOVERY.md + arc_of_discovery.svg — the 9-step executive summary, source to network (identical across RWA/HUF/Hs; added 2026-06-11)
companions.graduate_school: GRADUATE_SCHOOL.md — the deep onboarding curriculum (the graduate-level ai-refresh), weaving HISTORY_THREAD.md (the development+necessity thread). With DOCUMENT_DISTRIBUTION.md + TRIPLE_JOURNAL.md these form the shared 'map of the whole', identical across RWA/HUF/Hs (added 2026-06-12)

identity.contact_authority: RWA-001.json (this repo) -- the canonical contact/identity authority for the whole system (RWA/HUF/Hs); check there. RWA-001 wins on any conflict.
identity.domain: Professional audio engineering: organic digital loudspeaker design, Binaural Test Lab (BTL) certification, advanced acoustic methods
identity.role_in_corpus: Engineering home — where the instrument was built. The compositional mathematics later formalized in HUF (MC-4, EITT) and Hs (CNT/CNQ) was discovered empirically here, for loudspeakers.

canonical_names.BTL: Binaural Test Lab — single canonical identity (NOT 'Below Threshold Loudspeaker'; the dual gloss was an error). A sound-controlled professional laboratory; research deployment in Markham, Ontario plus a four-laboratory institutional network (two in Ottawa, two in Monaco) per a private Canadian industrial sponsor. See RWA-001.json.
canonical_names.DADC-DADI: Dimension-Apportioned Diffraction Correction and Inference — cabinet edge-diffraction prediction/equalization; the gain vector sums to exactly 6.02 dB across cabinet dimensions = a 3-simplex composition (the engineering origin of HUF's MC-4).
canonical_names.ADAC: part of the DADC/DADI/ADAC compositional-analysis chain
canonical_names.H1: Higgins Operator H1 — a nonlinear unity-normalization map (sum = 1) across hierarchical regimes preserving directional coherence; self-hosted working paper, February 2026 (NOT a formally peer-reviewed publication — do not miscite as 'published').
canonical_names.ODL: Organic Digital Loudspeakers (flagship paper, v2.6) — loudspeakers with digital-grade accuracy and natural acoustic behavior.

core_projects: Organic Digital Loudspeakers (v2.6) — flagship design framework
BTL Small Studio Lab — certified monitoring environment
Higgins Operator H1 — unity-normalization map (self-hosted working paper, Feb 2026)
lineage_one_liner: DADC was doing CoDa before CoDa was named: the 6.02 dB gain simplex in loudspeaker diffraction correction became HUF's MC-4 and, downstream, the Hs/CNT/CNQ instrument. The past is the strength and the future.

current_state_2026_06_07.siblings: higgins-decomposition (Hs, active instrument/conference repo) and Higgins-Unity-Framework (HUF, scientific framework). RWA is the engineering origin.

common_drift_errors.btl_dual_gloss: BTL = Binaural Test Lab only. 'Below Threshold Loudspeaker' is an error.
common_drift_errors.btl_basement_framing: BTL is a sound-controlled professional laboratory, not a 'basement lab'.
common_drift_errors.h1_published_miscite: H1 is a self-hosted working paper (Feb 2026), not a formal peer-reviewed publication.
